text: The function of the lifeboat davit limit switch is to:

options.text: Stop the boat from lowering too fast into the water
Cut off power to the winch when the lifeboat nears the final stowed position
Turn on the lifeboat internal lights

explanation: The limit switch is a safety device that cuts off the power to the winch motor when the lifeboat reaches the final stowed position, preventing damage to the davits.
